name: @nebula-studio/electron
description: An Electron application with Vue and TypeScript
author: Liao Han <liaohan5426@gmail.com>

scripts.typecheck: vp run typecheck:node && vp run typecheck:web && vp run typecheck:renderers
scripts.build: vp run typecheck && vp exec electron-vite build && vp run --filter @nebula-studio-renderer/docs build && node ./scripts/copy-docs-site.mjs
scripts.build:unpack: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --dir
scripts.pack:win: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --win
scripts.pack:mac: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --mac
scripts.pack:linux: vp run build && vp exec electron-builder --linux
